title: Angle basics
description: Determine which angle has a greater measure by looking at the size of the opening between the angle's rays.

hints:
Angles are measured by their opening.  The angle with a wider opening has a greater measure.

*Note: The length of the rays does not affect the angle’s measure.*

The rays on $\angle{\text{ B}}$ open wider than the rays on $\angle{\text{ A}}$ , so $\angle{\text{ B}}$  is greater:

[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A ray extends from point A towards 4 o’clock. A second ray extends from point A towards between 5 and 6 o’clock. An arc connects these two rays.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b32acf7612ab621c35f4b8a10806473c7c00b157)

![A ray extends upwards and slightly to the left from point B. A second ray extends to the right and slightly downward from point B. An arc connects these two rays.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/63d829893dd476b8a65a28331a1513e2e2760978)
